system.description:
Redemption cannot be given,

only the opportunity to grasp it.

LEVEL 3

Radiant Potential. Your Patron is a being of light, and grants you knowledge of Radiant spells. Your Shadow Blast and shadow minions deal either Radiant or Necrotic damage.

Divine Intervention. Reaction: Interpose for an ally with a shadow minion (minion must be within 2 spaces of your ally).

LEVEL 7

See the Light. When a shadow minion Interposes for an ally, the attacker becomes Blinded until the end of its next turn (after resolving the attack).

Serve the Light. Choose 1 Radiant Utility Spell.

LEVEL 11

Penance for your Sins. Your Shadow Blast and shadow minions grant allies temp HP instead of damaging them.

LEVEL 15

Redemption Within Reach. (1/Safe Rest) Action/Reaction: Until the beginning of your next turn, you gain immunity to all damage and all healing you do is doubled.

Blinding Sacrifice. The first time each encounter you drop to 0 HP, all enemies that can see you become Blinded and Dazed until the end of their next turn.
